questionHtml: Outline a health risk produced by exposure to radioactive decay.
markschemeHtml:
Any one:

«genetic» mutations ✔

«could cause» cancer ✔
Accept specific named types of cancer.

cells «in body» altered ✔

cells «in body» cannot function ✔

damaged DNA/proteins/enzymes/organs/tissue ✔

«radiation» burns ✔

hair loss ✔

damage in foetuses ✔

damages/weakens immune system ✔

meta.title: Outline a health risk produced by exposure to radioactive decay.
